title: FAC Composition
text: This issues with the approval of the competent Authority. kc.0 1.9 .11 F. No. 3-1/2016-FC Government of India Ministry of Environment, Forests and Climate Change (Forest Conservation Division) Indira Paryavaran Bhawan, Aliganj, Jor Bagh Road, NewOelhi —110 003 Dated: rq February, 2019. ORDER In exercise of powers conferred under Section 3 of the Forest (Conservation) Act 1980 read with rule 3(1) of the Forest (Conservation) Rules 2003, the Government of India hereby appoint the following as Non-official Expert member of the Forest Advisory Committee with immediate effect. Dr. Anmol Kumar, Ex- Director General of Forest Survey of India, Dehradun Uttarakhand. A-1701 16th floor prateek fedrow Sector 61 Noida — 201301. E-mail add: anmolkumar86564,gmail.com. 2. The non-official Member shall continue to hold office for a period of two years from the date of this order. 3. The terms of appointment of non-official member shall be in accordance with the Rule 4 of Forest (Conservation) Rules. 2003. (Sandeep Sharma) Assistant Inspector General of Forests Copy to: 1. All members of Forest Advisory Committee. 2. The Secretary, Ministry of Agriculture, GoI, New Delhi 3. The Principal Secretary (Forests) All States / UTs Govt 4. The Principal Chief Conservator of Forests / Nodal Officer FCA, All States / UTs Govt. 5. PS to the Hon'ble Minister EF&CC, GoI, New Delhi. 6. PPS to Secretary MoEF&CC, GoI, New Delhi. 7. The All Regional Offices, of MoEF&CC. 8. Dr. Anamol Kumar, A-1701, 16th Floor Prateek Fedrow Sector 61 Noida — 201301. 9. All DIGF (FC)/AIGF (FC)/Scientist (FC)/TOs (FC), MoEF&CC, GoI, New Delhi. 10. The Director, Regional Office, HQ, MoEF&CC, GoI, New Delhi. 11. Pay and Accounts Officer, MoEF&CC, GoI, New Delhi. 12. The Technical Director, NIC, MoEF&CC, GoI, New Delhi. 13. Dated: t,24 November, 2018 Order In exercise of power conferred under Section 3 of the Forest (Conservation) Act, 1980 read with Rule 3 (1) of the Forest (Conservation) Rules, 2003, the Government of India hereby appoints the following as Non-Official Expert Member for Forest Advisory Committee. (i). Shri Deepak Mohanty, Ex-Associate Professor, Indira Gandhi National Forest Academy Flat No. 3123, D. N. Oxy Park Apartment Dum Duma, Bhubaneswar-751019. (ii). Shri Sanjay V Deshmukh Vice-Chanceller, Mumbai University R/o M. G. Road, Fort, Mumbai- 400032 The non-official member shall continue to hold office for a period of two years from the date of this order. The terms of appointment of the non-official member shall be in accordance with the Rule 4 of the Forest (Conservation) Rules, 2003 This issue with the approval of Competent Authority.
